title: Promotions (promo code creation, management, application)
description: Discount code creation/management by admin and application of a promo code to an order, including validity periods.

inScope: Apply promo code to an order during checkout

acceptanceCriteria.text: Admin can create a promo code with a discount value and validity period
Customer can apply a valid promo code at checkout and see the discount reflected in the order total
An expired or invalid promo code is rejected with a clear message
